def positive_list_copy_in_loop_same_source():
    rule_id = "list_copy_in_loop_same_source"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "A list is copied on each loop iteration even though the source appears unchanged."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
